meta.title: Offer Secured | AmberNord
meta.description: You are part of the Launch Edition. Your order has been received.

og.title: Offer Secured | AmberNord
og.description: You are part of the Launch Edition.

confirm.heading: Order confirmed
confirm.lead: Your Launch Edition order has been received. Both bottles will ship today or tomorrow at the latest from our logistics centre in Aarau.

step1.title: Shipping & confirmation
step1.text: You will receive a shipping confirmation by email with a tracking link as soon as the package is on its way.

step2.title: 14 days of daily use
step2.text: One tablespoon in the morning on an empty stomach — neat or 1:10 with water. The second bottle covers your full observation phase.

step3.title: Day 14 — email reminder
step3.text: We send you a short email with the direct link to the review form. The link already contains your order number — you don't need to enter anything manually.

step4.title: Your review
step4.text: Roughly three minutes of effort. You describe in your own words what changed — energy, skin, sleep, digestion. Participation remains voluntary.

thanks: Thank you so much — you are part of something real.
